Package io.forja.components.selection.fxRangeSlider

Class FxRangeSlider

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.selection.fxRangeSlider.FxRangeSlider
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxRangeSlider extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A two-thumb range slider — lowValue + highValue.

Implemented as two overlaid transparent-track Sliders. The low slider is clamped to ≤ highValue and the high slider to ≥ lowValue, so thumbs can't cross.

Builder usage:

     
      FxRangeSlider price = FxRangeSlider.builder()
          .min(0).max(1000)
          .lowValue(100).highValue(500)
          .step(10)
          .prefix("$")
          .showValues(true)
          .build();
See Also:
  • FxRangeSlider.Builder
